creator: gerrit.beine@gmx.de
text:
Am Freitag, 9. Januar 2009 15:30:14 schrieb Edwin Groothuis:
> Maintainer of sysutils/megarc,
>
> Please note that PR ports/130326 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/130326

The latest version of megarc provided by LSI Logic is dated: 18-APR-05.
This causes crashs on 7.x, that's why it is broken at the moment.
I cannot solve the Problem, I guess this is on LSI Logic.

But I'll re-enable the port for releases below 7.

Expect the update within the next days.

So long...

Gerrit
